mechanism_narrative: An increase in the federal funds rate raises the discount rate for future equity cash flows, mechanically depressing S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden month-over-month spike in the unemployment rate signals immediate demand destruction and recession fears, triggering rapid equity sell-offs.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE increases by > 0.5 percentage points month-over-month
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in > 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising retail sales and falling housing starts indicates consumer spending is shifting to services, sustaining corporate earnings and supporting equity prices.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no predictive power with p-value > 0.10 in out-of-sample backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects capacity constraints and profit margin compression, leading to negative equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines coincide with positive SPX returns in > 60% of tightening periods.

mechanism_narrative: CPIAUCSL exceeding 3.0 percent triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, causing immediate risk-off positioning and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Market absorbs CPI spikes without negative 5-day returns in > 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total employment and declining unemployment indicates robust labor market absorption, driving consumer confidence and supporting positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS and UNRATE signal yields a Sharpe ratio below 0.5 in forward return portfolios.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly correlates with corporate revenue expansion, mechanically lifting S&P 500 forward returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows zero correlation with 20-day forward returns across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 550 thousand units signals a credit crunch in the construction sector, dragging down related equity valuations and broader market sentiment.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in > 60% of triggered months despite the housing signal.
